ai_report.executive_summary: The simulation for Test achieved a readiness score of 78%. 1196 rule failures were detected across selected modules.
ai_report.risk_explanation: Critical and high severity failures indicate gaps in onboarding, monitoring, or cross-border controls. These should be remediated before regulatory submission.
recommendations: Close all critical and high severity rule failures.
Strengthen KYC completion checks before high-value transfers.
Enhance sanctions and international transfer monitoring.
next_steps: Review failed rules with the compliance team.
Update product controls and rerun the simulation.
Prepare evidence pack for regulator review.
